brain_dump.welcome_subtitle: Clear Your Mind. Find Your Focus.
brain_dump.welcome_desc: Write down everything. No judgment. No sorting. Just release.
brain_dump.step_1: 1. Download your brain onto the digital page.
brain_dump.step_2: 2. Sort into what needs action and what can wait.
brain_dump.step_3: 3. Focus on just one small next step.
brain_dump.dump_hint: Anything that's on your mind right now.
brain_dump.sort_desc: Drag and drop or click to move items.
brain_dump.action_desc: Something I need to do soon.
brain_dump.later_desc: Not urgent, but keep in mind.
brain_dump.letgo_desc: Not important or out of my control.
brain_dump.small_step_desc: Focus on just the first tiny thing for each action.
brain_dump.first_step_placeholder: What is the very first step?
brain_dump.reflection_desc: How do you feel now that you've sorted your brain?

mission.intro_p1: When you're feeling depressed, anxious, or overwhelmed, it's easy to lose sight of what truly matters to you.
mission.intro_p2: A personal mission statement is not about pressure or productivity. It is a gentle reminder of your values — the kind of person you want to be, even during difficult seasons.
mission.intro_no_wrong: There are no right or wrong answers here.
mission.reflection_being_label: Even on hard days, I want to be someone who ________.
mission.reflection_life_label: Right now, I want my life to feel more ________.
mission.mission_so_my_life: , so my life can feel more
mission.mission_saved: Your mission statement has been saved.
mission.mission_return_whenever: You can return to it whenever you need direction.
mission.history_empty: You haven't saved any mission statements yet.
mission.history_empty_hint: When you're ready, create one and it will appear here.
